scope.purpose: incremental official/high-trust source audit before any database or candidate promotion

safety.openPullRequestCheck: No open PL Athlete Research pull requests found before branch creation.

safety.noInferencePolicy: No achievements, same-person identity links, or record claims were inferred from exact-name-only or absent search results.

sourceChecks.name: Repository main database skeleton
sourceChecks.usedFor: Confirmed roster identities, lot numbers, duplicate-name risk, aliases, and v5.9.6_LOCK preservation target.

sourceChecks.name: GitHub open pull request search
sourceChecks.usedFor: Checked for open overlapping PL Athlete Research PRs before branch creation.

sourceChecks.name: HPA official site/domain search
sourceChecks.usedFor: Exact-name and unspaced-name checks for Hokkaido domestic PL/BP result rows. No row-level candidate was captured in this batch.

sourceChecks.name: JPA/IPF/Goodlift/APF-AAPF-style web checks
sourceChecks.usedFor: Exact-name checks covering national, international/world, three-lift powerlifting, and single bench press histories. No row-level candidate was captured in this batch.

result.summary: Lot 56-60 were audited as a small batch. No confirmed history was promoted and no uncertain official/high-trust candidate row was added.
